creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Sep 17, 2000 at 04:44:31PM -0400, Adam wrote:
> I have not this time.  In the  past I have tried emailing several times, I
> have not received a single answer from the Maintainer ever.  According to
> the cvs log for the Makefile the last submission by the Maintainer was 8
> months ago.  I'll include their email in the cc for this.. 

Ok.  MAINTAINER has exactly 2 weeks from today to reply, otherwise
I'll assume they're no longer interested, and revert maintainership
of gcombust to ports@FreeBSD.org (or yourself if you want it).

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.			ade@FreeBSD.org
